findings.title: Vulnerable dependency: express
findings.description: Express before 4.17.3 allows Open Redirect attacks via the redirect function.

findings.title: Vulnerable dependency: lodash
findings.description: Lodash versions prior to 4.17.21 are vulnerable to Command Injection via the template function.

findings.title: Vulnerable dependency: axios
findings.description: axios is vulnerable to Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity
